currency.name: Coins
currency.philosophy: Resource management like Binding of Isaac. Find coins, make tough choices about what to buy.

vending_machine_room.description: Every floor has 1 vending machine room
vending_machine_room.selection: Player chooses 1 of 3 random items to buy

mechanics.one_purchase: Can only buy one item per vending machine visit
mechanics.multiple_machines: Can't revisit same machine, but different rooms might have machines
mechanics.refresh: Items don't refresh - it's 1 choice per floor's machine

pool_artifacts: Any base artifact (Battery, Microscope, Lens, Prism, Light Source)
Any discovered combo artifact (Electron Microscope, etc.)

economy_balance.philosophy: Artifacts are expensive. Require 2-3 floors of saving OR lucky environmental breaks.

math.with_luck: Secret room (50-80 coins) + 2 normal rooms = artifact affordable

tuning.note: All values are starting estimates. Easy to adjust if economy feels too tight/loose.
tuning.scaling: Prices scale per floor, coin drops scale with difficulty
tuning.no_softlock: Designed so players can't get stuck (always path to victory)

scenario_1_early_run.situation: Floor 1, found 30 coins, at vending machine
scenario_1_early_run.choice_a: Buy Healing (35 coins) - risky, no buffer
scenario_1_early_run.choice_b: Buy Match (25 coins) - utility, save for next floor
scenario_1_early_run.choice_c: Buy Key (60 coins) - can't afford, skip this machine

scenario_2_mid_run.situation: Floor 2, found 80 coins total, 60 remaining after spending
scenario_2_mid_run.choice_a: Buy Artifact (120 coins) - not enough, skip
scenario_2_mid_run.choice_b: Buy Blowtorch (60 coins) - saves money for next floor
scenario_2_mid_run.choice_c: Buy Healing + Match (70 coins) - get multiple tools

scenario_3_late_run.situation: Floor 4, found 250 coins, at vending machine with artifact available
scenario_3_late_run.choice_a: Buy Artifact (240 coins) - spend almost everything for power
scenario_3_late_run.choice_b: Buy Key + Healing (155 coins) - safe, diverse
scenario_3_late_run.choice_c: Save for Floor 5 - risky, what if need healing?

tuning_parameters.MVP_testing: Play through 5 runs, track average coins per floor, adjust as needed
